fields.explainEn: The index of the aggregate.
The name of the aggregate.

fields.explainZh: 集群存储池和存储卷的在线状态，该指标只有在集群接口下才返回。
fields.explainEn: State of the aggregate, such as "online" or "offline".

fields.explainZh: 集群存储池和存储卷的在线状态，该指标只有在集群接口下才返回。
fields.explainEn: Status of the aggregate, such as "normal" or "reconstructing". May include several values separated by comma and space.
Free space in this file system.
Usage Ratio of the file system.
The ID of the file system.
The index of the file system.

fields.explainZh: 文件系统的名称，可以映射到存储池和存储卷。
fields.explainEn: The name of the file system.
Volume or aggregate and its snapshot is "available" or "partiallyAvailable".

fields.explainZh: 集群存储池和存储卷的在线状态，该指标只有在集群接口下才返回。
fields.explainEn: The state of the cluster aggregates and volumes.
The size of the file system.

fields.explainZh: 安装文件系统的容器的类型。
fields.explainEn: The type of the file system.
Used space in this file system.
A textual string that contains interface information.
The index of the net interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今接收的被阻止包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of non-unicast packets delivered to a higher-layer protocol.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今接收的错误包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of inbound packets which were chosen to be discarded even though no errors had been detected to prevent their being deliverable to a higher-layer protocol.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今接收的非单播包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of subnetwork-non-unicast packets delivered to a higher-layer protocol.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收流量的大小。
fields.explainEn: The size of received on the interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口接收包的速率。
fields.explainEn: The speed of received on the interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今接收的单播包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of subnetwork-unicast packets delivered to a higher-layer protocol.

fields.nameZh: 接收不支持或未知协议包数
fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今接收的不支持或未知协议包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of inbound packets that contained errors preventing them from being deliverable to a higher-layer protocol.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今发送的被阻止包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of outbound packets which were chosen to be discarded even though no errors had been detected to prevent their being transmitted.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今发送的错误包数。
fields.explainEn: The number of outbound packets that could not be transmitted because of errors.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今发送的非单播包数。
fields.explainEn: The total number of packets that higher-level protocols requested be transmitted to a subnetwork-non-unicast address.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送流量的大小。
fields.explainEn: The size of sended on the interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口发送包的速率。
fields.explainEn: The speed of sended on the interface.

fields.explainZh: 网络接口至今发送的单播包数。
fields.explainEn: The total number of packets that higher-level protocols requested be transmitted to a subnetwork-unicast address.
Device Model.
Type of the device.
Free space of this raid.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘阵列的索引,由卷索引加磁盘阵列组索引加磁盘阵列索引构成。
fields.explainEn: The index of this raid,consist of the index of volume,the index of the raid group and the index of the raid.
The name of the raid.
The size of this raid.
Currently in use on the referenced disk drive.
Usage ratio of this raid.
The status of the referenced disk drive.

fields.explainZh: 该磁盘阵列所构成的存储卷的索引。
fields.explainEn: A number that identifies the volume that this raid belongs to.
The index of the volume.
The name of the volume.
Volume is "available" or "partiallyAvailable".This field is returned only from the cluster interfaces.
State of the volume, such as "online" or "offline".
Status of the volume, such as "normal" or "reconstructing". May include several values separated by comma and space.

fields.explainZh: 存储卷的类型，分为传统卷和灵活卷。
fields.explainEn: The type of the volume.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
